scripts.check: npm run check --workspace=pi-extension-opencode-cloudflare && npm run check --workspace=pi-herdr-orchestrator-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-model-families-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-save-md-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-web-tools-extension
scripts.pack:pi-packages: mkdir -p out && bun run --cwd packages/pi-model-families/extensions/model-families check && bun run --cwd packages/pi-herdr-agents/extensions/herdr-orchestrator check && (cd packages/pi-model-families && bun pm pack --destination ../../out) && (cd packages/pi-herdr-agents && bun pm pack --destination ../../out)
scripts.publish:pi-model-families: bun run --cwd packages/pi-model-families/extensions/model-families check && (cd packages/pi-model-families && bun publish --access public)
scripts.publish:pi-herdr-agents: bun run --cwd packages/pi-herdr-agents/extensions/herdr-orchestrator check && (cd packages/pi-herdr-agents && bun publish --access public)
scripts.publish:pi-packages: npm run publish:pi-model-families && npm run publish:pi-herdr-agents
